Help

Frequently Asked Questions

What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?+
Our standard MOQ is 12 pieces per design/colour. For custom or private label orders, MOQ may vary — message us on WhatsApp for details.
How long does shipping take?+
Domestic orders within India typically take 4-7 working days. International export orders take 10-20 working days depending on destination and shipping method (air vs sea).
What payment methods do you accept?+
We accept bank transfer, UPI (for domestic orders), and international wire transfer for export orders. A partial advance is typically required to confirm bulk orders.
Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?+
Yes! We're happy to send single-piece samples before you commit to a bulk order. Sample costs and shipping are charged separately — ask us on WhatsApp.
Do you offer private label / custom branding?+
Yes, we offer private labelling, custom tags, and custom packaging for bulk orders. Visit our Custom Orders section below or message us with your requirements.
What fabric do you use?+
Our night suits and shirts are made from 100% pure cotton with hand block prints. Jackets use quilted Kantha cotton fabric. All fabrics are breathable and pre-shrunk for durability.
